mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EMV_SCAN_FILE_DEL_HST ( FILE_ID , SCAN_ID , DOC_ID , FILE_SIZE , FILE_EXT , RGST_DT , RGST_PRSN_ID , ORIGIN_DIR , PROC_RGST_CD ) SELECT FILE_ID , SCAN_ID , MIN(DOC_ID) , MIN(FILE_SIZE) , MIN(FILE_EXT) , MIN(RGST_DT) , MIN(RGST_PRSN_ID) , MIN(ORIGIN_DIR) , MIN(RGST_CD) FROM ( SELECT FILE_ID , SCAN_ID , DOC_ID , FILE_SIZE , FILE_EXT , RGST_DT , RGST_PRSN_ID , ORIGIN_DIR , '01' AS RGST_CD FROM EMV_SCAN_FILE@DL_MCP WHERE USE_YN = 'N' UNION SELECT FILE_ID , SCAN_ID , DOC_ID , FILE_SIZE , FILE_EXT , RGST_DT , RGST_PRSN_ID , ORIGIN_DIR , '02' AS RGST_CD FROM EMV_SCAN_FILE@DL_MCP WHERE SCAN_ID IN ( ( SELECT SCAN_ID FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP WHERE PSTATE = '10' MINUS SELECT SCAN_ID FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP WHERE PSTATE = '00' ) UNION ( SELECT SCAN_ID FROM MSP_REQUEST WHERE PSTATE = '10' MINUS SELECT SCAN_ID FROM MSP_REQUEST WHERE PSTATE = '00' ) ) UNION SELECT FILE_ID , SCAN_ID , DOC_ID , FILE_SIZE , FILE_EXT , RGST_DT , RGST_PRSN_ID , ORIGIN_DIR , '03' AS RGST_CD FROM EMV_SCAN_FILE@DL_MCP WHERE SCAN_ID IN ( ( SELECT SCAN_ID FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP WHERE PSTATE = '20' MINUS SELECT SCAN_ID FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP WHERE PSTATE = '00' ) UNION ( SELECT SCAN_ID FROM MSP_REQUEST WHERE PSTATE = '20' MINUS SELECT SCAN_ID FROM MSP_REQUEST WHERE PSTATE = '00' ) ) ) WHERE SCAN_ID IS NOT NULL AND RGST_DT BETWEEN ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE+(SELECT ETC1 FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'DEV0000' AND CD_VAL = 'SCAN')),-1) AND ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE+(SELECT ETC2 FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'DEV0000' AND CD_VAL = 'SCAN')),-1)-1/60/60/24 GROUP BY FILE_ID, SCAN_ID ORDER BY MIN(RGST_DT)
mapper.select: SELECT /* ScanMgmtMapper.getScanMgmtList */ FILE_ID , FILE_ID||'.'||FILE_EXT AS FILE_NM , SCAN_ID , DOC_ID , ORIGIN_DIR FROM EMV_SCAN_FILE_DEL_HST WHERE PROC_STATUS = 'R' ORDER BY PROC_DTTM ASC
